headline: Corning Taps Meta And Solar To Power AI Infrastructure Growth
summary: Corning (NYSE:GLW) has expanded its role as an AI infrastructure supplier through a new fiber optic partnership with Meta Platforms. The company is also investing in U.S. solar wafer manufacturing, strengthening its presence in the domestic solar supply chain. These moves connect Corning directly to both hyperscale data networks for AI and the buildout of U.S. solar capacity. For anyone tracking Corning, the story now goes beyond specialty glass into core infrastructure for AI and clean...
